title: B+Tree查询完整性证明
target: B+Tree query completeness — range query [low, high] returns exactly all matching tuples
description: 证明对于列 c 上的 B+Tree 索引，范围查询 [low, high] 精确返回所有 c ∈ [low, high] 的元组。

evidence.expected_result: Dafny program verifier finished with 1 verified, 0 errors
evidence.test_evidence: cargo test -p sqlrustgo-storage covers B+Tree structural properties

known_issues.docs_proof_file_not_executable: docs/proof/PROOF-013-btree-invariants.dfy contains markdown headers (lines starting with >) which cause Dafny 2.3.0 parse errors. The executable version is docs/formal/btree_invariants.dfy with no markdown headers.
known_issues.run_all_proofs_sh_bug: scripts/verify/run_all_proofs.sh verifies docs/proof/PROOF-013-*.dfy which has markdown header and will FAIL. Use docs/formal/btree_invariants.dfy instead.
known_issues.dafny_version: Dafny 2.3.0.10506 does not support --verification-time-limit syntax; use /dafnyVerify:1 /compile:0 instead

author: openclaw
